content: Design unified BrokerAdapterInterface v2 (session, auth, heartbeat, reconnect)
Create BaseWSAdapter abstract class (shared WSS logic for IQ/Binomo/ExpertOption)
Create BaseCDPAdapter / lazy-load Playwright for Olymp Trade
B.2 - Implement IQ Option Real Adapter (full WSS: auth, order, payout cache)
B.3 - Implement Olymp Trade Adapter (CDP/DOM automation skeleton)
B.5 - Implement Expert Option High-Freq Adapter (WSS)
B.6 - MockWSServer for local testing (no real broker needed)
B.7 - Unit tests for each adapter against MockWSServer (18 new tests)
B.8 - Multi-Broker Router v2 wired to BrokerAdapterRegistry
B.9 - Broker Credential Vault (.env docs + validation)
B.10 - Run full test suite (114/114), backend+desktop builds PASS
Report Plan B completion to user + ask direction for DevSecOps Atlas
